description: Busbud is a travel booking service for comparing and purchasing bus and train tickets. The busbud-int.com domain appears to host Busbud infrastructure and trip-related services.
summary: Busbud-int.com exposes a known MCP server at https://trips-mcp-production-us.busbud-int.com/mcp; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found for this domain.
